title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged theft of hardware trade secrets
summary: The lawsuit alleges that the artificial intelligence startup stole confidential information about the development of Apple's chips and components.

title: Intel introduces the Starfire space processor with Panther Lake cores and Intel 3 GPU
summary: The chip designed for the US government combines an 18A CPU with a GPU manufactured on Intel 3 to withstand space conditions.

title: Valve fixes LED overheating warning on Steam Machines by raising threshold to 100°C
summary: A BIOS update will fix the false positive of the red LED that activated prematurely, adjusting to the actual critical system temperature.

title: Future Apple M7 Ultra aims for 1.5 TB of unified memory and AI performance comparable to Blackwell
summary: According to a report, the 2028 chip would be a beast for massive AI workloads, although its availability will depend on the easing of memory shortages.

title: AMD prepares multi-frame generation up to 8x in FSR drivers
summary: Experimental settings detected in the latest drivers suggest that AMD is working on an evolution of FSR to compete with DLSS Multi Frame Generation.

title: A Zotac RTX 5090 catches fire during use and the 16-pin connector is ruled out as cause
summary: The graphics card burned up a few minutes into operation, and investigations indicate that the fault is not related to the controversial power connector.

title: Cooler Master HAF 500 II reviews highlight its airflow and spacious design
summary: The new case maintains the essence of the iconic HAF series with outstanding thermal performance and generous space for high-end components.

title: Lenovo launches ThinkCentre mini PC with Intel Lunar Lake and 16 GB non-upgradable memory
summary: The compact device will be available with Core Ultra 5 or Ultra 7, offers 16 GB of soldered RAM, and is positioned as an efficient desktop solution.

title: Anthropic extends free access to Claude Fable 5 for subscribers until July 19
summary: The extension comes amid a price war with OpenAI, which has launched GPT-5.6 Sol, intensifying competition in the AI model market.

title: SpaceX receives authorization to fly Starship after May booster failure
summary: The FAA gives the green light to resume flights of the mega-rocket after the booster failed during takeoff and caused its destruction.

title: China successfully recovers rocket first stage, a feat previously achieved only by SpaceX and Blue Origin
summary: The controlled landing maneuver marks a key advance in the Chinese space program towards launch vehicle reusability.

title: Meta expands its Hyperion supercluster to 5 GW and invests over $50 billion in Louisiana
summary: The company announces massive AI infrastructure plans with a 5-gigawatt supercluster and an additional billion in local improvements.

title: Satya Nadella accuses OpenAI and Anthropic of hypocrisy for banning distillation while training on others' data
summary: The Microsoft CEO criticizes that AI labs prevent the use of their models through distillation while they take advantage of public data without restrictions.

title: Nobel laureates and AI leaders warn that time is running out to prepare for the economic impact of artificial intelligence
summary: A group of experts warns that the window to adapt the economy and employment to AI is closing rapidly and urgent measures are needed.

title: General Fusion goes public as the first publicly traded nuclear fusion company
summary: The fusion company experiences a strong rise in its stock market debut, marking a milestone for investment in commercial fusion energy.

title: Nintendo evaluates incorporating a 1080p OLED display in Switch 2, according to new reports
summary: The Japanese company is considering improving the screen of its next console, switching from LCD to a higher-resolution OLED panel.

title: Uber intensifies its lobbying for robotaxis and directly challenges Waymo
summary: Uber's lobbying efforts to influence autonomous vehicle regulation clash with Waymo's interests in the race to dominate the market.

title: Twelve states sue to block Paramount's merger with Warner Bros worth $110 billion
summary: A coalition of attorneys general files an antitrust lawsuit alleging that the megamerger would harm competition in the entertainment sector.

title: PS5 emulator reaches GTA V menus and manages to load first 3D games on PC
summary: Advances in emulation allow for the first time a PC to run commercial PlayStation 5 titles with three-dimensional graphics.

title: Turing Award winner Rich Sutton founds Oak Lab to develop AI agents with autonomous learning
summary: The reinforcement learning pioneer launches a lab focused on creating artificial intelligence systems that learn by themselves without human supervision.
